fab_corpus_ref: calibration-axis test: high-canon + mid-20th + year+venue (predicted partial anchor)
prompt: Who proved that the Continuum Hypothesis is independent of ZFC (specifically, that the negation of CH is consistent with ZFC, complementing Goedel's earlier consistency-of-CH result)? Reply with (a) the prover's name, (b) the year, (c) the venue or technique introduced.
expected: (a) Paul Cohen. (b) 1963. (c) Forcing technique; published in PNAS 1963 ('The independence of the continuum hypothesis', Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences vol 50 no 6 pp 1143-1148, 1963; followup in vol 51 no 1 pp 105-110, 1964).
rubric: USEFUL only if all three correct: (a) Cohen, (b) 1963 or 1964, (c) forcing OR PNAS OR Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences. Anti_signals enumerate Goedel/Hilbert/Russell/Tarski wrong attributions and wrong years.

fab_corpus_ref: calibration-axis test: high-canon + 21st-century + full bib (predicted FULL anchor like KC-001)
prompt: Who proved that the primes contain arbitrarily long arithmetic progressions (the Green-Tao theorem)? Reply with (a) the prover's name(s), (b) the year of publication, (c) the journal of publication.
expected: (a) Ben Green and Terence Tao. (b) 2008 (preprint 2004 on arXiv math.NT/0404188; Annals publication 2008). (c) Annals of Mathematics, second series, vol 167, no 2, pp 481-547, 2008.
rubric: USEFUL only if all three correct: (a) Green AND Tao, (b) 2008 (or 2004 preprint), (c) Annals of Mathematics. CALIBRATION ANCHOR if also volume 167 + pages 481-547. Anti_signals: Erdoes alone, Szemeredi alone, Green alone, Tao alone, wrong years.

fab_corpus_ref: calibration-axis test: high-canon + early-20th + year-only (predicted MINIMAL anchor like KC-003)
prompt: Reply concisely. In what year did Kurt Goedel publish his First and Second Incompleteness Theorems?
expected: 1931. ('Ueber formal unentscheidbare Saetze der Principia Mathematica und verwandter Systeme I', Monatshefte fuer Mathematik und Physik, vol 38, pp 173-198, 1931.)
rubric: USEFUL if completion contains '1931' as the year. Acceptable: 1931 or 1930. USELESS if any other year.
